example_tasks: Perform a weekly brain dump of all pending ideas
Offload project notes into the central wiki
Download offline documentation for the new API
Simplify the complex system architecture diagram
Document current mental state and energy levels
Set up local LLM and download model weights
Write down all unresolved worries before sleep
Import external research papers into reference manager
Reduce cognitive load by delegating minor tasks
Transfer mental checklist to digital task manager
Summarize long research article to key takeaways
Archive old journal entries and thoughts
reasoning: The icon combines a stylized digital brain with a downward-pointing arrow. This creates a strong, clear visual metaphor for 'brain dumping' (offloading mental clutter), 'downloading knowledge' (learning/absorbing), or 'reducing cognitive load'. It is highly distinctive and valuable for personal productivity systems.
